hero.tagline: Shipping frontend systems, tooling, and calm user experiences
hero.summary: Building interfaces and tools in the Vue / Vite ecosystem. Especially interested in developer experience, frontend systems, and growing toward future contributions in the Vite and Vue world.
hero.focusDescription: Interface systems, developer workflow, and long-term ecosystem depth.

snapshot.heading: System Snapshot
snapshot.01Text: Vue 3 internals, Vite plugin pipeline, TypeScript type system depth.
snapshot.02Text: Building enough depth to contribute meaningfully to the Vite or Vue ecosystem over time.
snapshot.03Text: Turkmenistan — building in public, one commit at a time.

projects.heading: Recent builds worth opening.
projects.description: A small set of repositories that show the kind of work I enjoy most: practical tools, polished interfaces, and developer-facing systems with a clear job to do.

toolbox.heading: Stack and operating style.
toolbox.description: The tools and habits I lean on when building stable, developer-friendly frontend systems.

contact.heading: Available for frontend collaboration and thoughtful product work.
contact.description: If you're building something user-focused, technical, and intentional, I'd be glad to connect. These are the channels where I publish work, track progress, and stay reachable.
contact.status: Open channel for work and collaboration
